detectors.description:
Reentrancy in SUCHI._transfer(address,address,uint256) (SUCHI.sol#663-787):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (SUCHI.sol#727)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (SUCHI.sol#801-813)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (SUCHI.sol#733)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (SUCHI.sol#821)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (SUCHI.sol#785)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (SUCHI.sol#947)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (SUCHI.sol#927)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (SUCHI.sol#929)
	SUCHI._rOwned (SUCHI.sol#333) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- SUCHI._takeTeam(uint256) (SUCHI.sol#941-949)
	- SUCHI._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (SUCHI.sol#901-937)
	- SUCHI.balanceOf(address) (SUCHI.sol#489-493)
	- SUCHI.constructor() (SUCHI.sol#423-453)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (SUCHI.sol#785)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (SUCHI.sol#955)
	SUCHI._rTotal (SUCHI.sol#347) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- SUCHI._getCurrentSupply() (SUCHI.sol#1097-1107)
	- SUCHI._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (SUCHI.sol#953-959)
	- SUCHI.constructor() (SUCHI.sol#423-453)
	- SUCHI.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (SUCHI.sol#585-607)

		- [_rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount)](SUCHI.sol#L927)
		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](SUCHI.sol#L929)
	[SUCHI._rOwned](SUCHI.sol#L333) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [SUCHI._takeTeam(uint256)](SUCHI.sol#L941-L949)
	- [SUCHI._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](SUCHI.sol#L901-L937)
	- [SUCHI.balanceOf(address)](SUCHI.sol#L489-L493)
	- [SUCHI.constructor()](SUCHI.sol#L423-L453)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](SUCHI.sol#L785)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](SUCHI.sol#L955)
	[SUCHI._rTotal](SUCHI.sol#L347) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [SUCHI._getCurrentSupply()](SUCHI.sol#L1097-L1107)
	- [SUCHI._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](SUCHI.sol#L953-L959)

	- _transfer(sender,recipient,amount) (SUCHI.sol#561)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (SUCHI.sol#801-813)
	External calls sending eth:
	- _transfer(sender,recipient,amount) (SUCHI.sol#561)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (SUCHI.sol#821)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _approve(sender,_msgSender(),_allowances[sender][_msgSender()].sub(amount,ERC20: transfer amount exceeds allowance)) (SUCHI.sol#563-577)
		- _allowances[owner][spender] = amount (SUCHI.sol#655)

	- _transfer(sender,recipient,amount) (SUCHI.sol#561)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (SUCHI.sol#821)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _approve(sender,_msgSender(),_allowances[sender][_msgSender()].sub(amount,ERC20: transfer amount exceeds allowance)) (SUCHI.sol#563-577)
		- _allowances[owner][spender] = amount (SUCHI.sol#655)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Approval(owner,spender,amount) (SUCHI.sol#657)
		- _approve(sender,_msgSender(),_allowances[sender][_msgSender()].sub(amount,ERC20: transfer amount exceeds allowance)) (SUCHI.sol#563-577)
